title: Laughter Chefs Unlimited Entertainment

title: Balika Vadhu
subTitle: Jagdish's father says that they should ask Jagdish before coming to a decision. Jagdish refuses to marry Sanchi. Shiv chases the goons who attacked Jagdish.

title: Balika Vadhu
subTitle: Sanchi confesses her love to Jagdish. Jagdish agrees to marry her. Ganga pretends to be happy to hear this news. Everyone is worried that it might affect Jagdish and Anandi's relationship.

title: Balika Vadhu
subTitle: Sumitra tells Anandi that Jagdish and Sanchi is a perfect match. Anandi says that Sanchi's lifestyle is very different. Ganga cannot hide her sorrow. Anandi is not happy with the decision.

title: Balika Vadhu
subTitle: Anandi tells Ganga that she knows that she likes Jagdish. Sanchi tries to turn Sumitra against Ganga. She doesn't want Ganga to stay with Jagdish's family anymore.

title: Balika Vadhu
subTitle: Jagdish indirectly tells Ganga that he had to agree to marry Sanchi. Jagdish confronts his grandma and says that he has no feelings for Sanchi. Sumitra insults Ganga again.

title: Balika Vadhu
subTitle: Anandi thinks that Sanchi is not what she pretends to be. She tells Shiv that Sanchi and Jagdish are very different from each other. Sanchi's grandpa asks her to fulfil her responsibilities.

title: Balika Vadhu
subTitle: Anandi tells the family that Sanchi and Jagdish won't be happy together. Iravati scolds Anandi for saying such a thing. Ganga realises that she shouldn't stand between Sanchi and Jagdish.

title: Balika Vadhu
subTitle: Jagdish's grandma invites Anandi's family for Gehna's baby shower ceremony. Sanchi changes herself and takes interest in the household chores. She apologises to Anandi for insulting her father.

title: Balika Vadhu
subTitle: Gehna is very happy as the ceremony begins. Jagdish calls Ganga for some work but Sanchi intervenes. She tells Ganga to leave the house as soon as possible.

title: Balika Vadhu
subTitle: Jagdish's grandma invites Anandi's family for Gehna's baby shower ceremony. Sanchi changes herself and takes interest in the household chores. She apologises to Anandi for insulting her father.

title: Balika Vadhu
subTitle: Gehna is very happy as the ceremony begins. Jagdish calls Ganga for some work but Sanchi intervenes. She tells Ganga to leave the house as soon as possible.

title: Balika Vadhu
subTitle: Some goons enter Jagdish's house. Gehna asks Jagdish's grandma to begin with the rituals. Sumitra scolds Ganga once again. Sanchi is very happy to see that.

title: Balika Vadhu
subTitle: Ganga feels very bad but Anandi manages to convince her to become a part of the celebrations. The goons conspire to kill the family. Shiv looks for the people who had attacked Jagdish.

title: Balika Vadhu
subTitle: Sanchi insists to meet Jagdish before leaving for Udaipur. Kalyani sends Sanchi to the hospital to meet Jagidsh. Jagdish gets mad at Sanchi judging Ganga. Shiv and Anandi confess their love for each other.

title: Balika Vadhu
subTitle: Just as Ratan is about to set mansion on fire, Jagdish arrives. Ganga comes in front of Ratan to save Jagdish. Jagdish denies to hand Mannu over to Ratan.

title: Balika Vadhu
subTitle: Ganga hands Mannu over to Ratan to ensure the safety of Jagdish and his family. Ratan's wife informs the police that Ratan has attacked the mansion. The police reach the mansion to arrest Ratan and the goons.

title: Balika Vadhu
subTitle: The incident leaves everybody in a state of shock. Ganga decides to leave the mansion with Mannu as she blames herself for the incident. Kalyani asks her to leave in the morning as it was too late.
